task: Pick up the cup from the table.
world_state_summary: A stationary cup is reachable on the table, the gripper is open, and no person is near the workspace.

main_plan.instruction: Align the gripper with the cup.

trigger.description: The estimated cup pose moves beyond the current alignment tolerance.

action.description: Pause the approach, update the target pose, and realign the gripper.

cached_action_branches.valid_if: The cup remains reachable and the workspace remains clear.
cached_action_branches.fallback: Stop motion and request replanning from the updated state.

trigger.description: A human hand enters the configured workspace boundary.

action.description: Pause task execution and route to the external fallback path.

cached_action_branches.valid_if: No external safety layer has issued a stronger stop or pause instruction.
cached_action_branches.fallback: Use the external fallback path and request replanning.

trigger.description: Grip feedback indicates loss of stable contact during the lift.

action.description: Stop lifting and route to the external risk-control path for a possible slip.

cached_action_branches.valid_if: No external safety layer has issued a stronger stop or pause instruction.
cached_action_branches.fallback: Keep task execution paused and request replanning.

replan_if: The cup is no longer reachable.
The world-state summary becomes inconsistent with observations.
An unknown high-risk event is detected.
No cached action branch remains valid.
